{"id":"project-LICHEN-wdnm","title":"oscore: MemorySecurityContext missing algorithm validation","description":"File: python/src/lichen/crypto/oscore.py
Lines: 82-83

The constructor accesses algorithm and hashfun dictionaries without validation:

```python
self.alg_aead = algorithms[algorithm]
self.hashfun = hashfunctions[hashfun]
```

If an invalid algorithm ID or hashfun name is passed, this raises a cryptic KeyError instead of a clear ValueError with guidance on valid values.

Example:
```python
MemorySecurityContext(..., algorithm=999)  # Raises: KeyError: 999
```

Fix: Add validation with helpful error message listing valid algorithms/hashfunctions.","status":"open","priority":3,"issue_type":"bug","owner":"me@mark.atwood.name","created_at":"2026-07-12T06:17:15.979063Z","created_by":"Mark Atwood","updated_at":"2026-07-12T06:17:15.979118Z"}

{"id":"project-LICHEN-wdnm","title":"oscore: MemorySecurityContext missing algorithm validation","description":"File: python/src/lichen/crypto/oscore.py
Lines: 82-83

The constructor accesses algorithm and hashfun dictionaries without validation:

```python
self.alg_aead = algorithms[algorithm]
self.hashfun = hashfunctions[hashfun]
```

If an invalid algorithm ID or hashfun name is passed, this raises a cryptic KeyError instead of a clear ValueError with guidance on valid values.

Example:
```python
MemorySecurityContext(..., algorithm=999)  # Raises: KeyError: 999
```

Fix: Add validation with helpful error message listing valid algorithms/hashfunctions.","status":"in_progress","priority":3,"issue_type":"bug","assignee":"AI Agent","owner":"me@mark.atwood.name","created_at":"2026-07-12T06:17:15.979063Z","created_by":"Mark Atwood","updated_at":"2026-07-23T03:58:12.078030627Z","started_at":"2026-07-23T03:58:12.078030627Z","lease_expires_at":"2026-07-23T04:03:12.078030627Z","heartbeat_at":"2026-07-23T03:58:12.078030627Z"}
